the real cost of Ahrefs isn't $129/mo.

it's $129 + Buffer ($15) + SpyFu ($39) + Surfer SEO ($89) = $272/mo.

SEMrush does all 4 for $140.

or you can buy them separately and feel productive about having 4 dashboards open.

7 AI tools I actually use daily to run a one-person business:

not a listicle. real costs. real ROI. every tool earns back its subscription in the first week or gets cancelled.

the 'best AI tools' articles are written by people who never used them. this one isn't.

Smartlead vs Instantly is the cold email version of Ahrefs vs SEMrush.

one does infrastructure better (Smartlead/Ahrefs).
one does everything in one place (Instantly/SEMrush).

pick based on what you actually need. not what looks cooler.

wrote the full breakdown:

reply to cold email posts:

i compared Smartlead and Instantly feature by feature. unlimited mailboxes on both. Smartlead wins on deliverability and API. Instantly wins on UI and built-in lead finder ($30 vs $39/mo).

full comparison with decision tree: [link]
built a free task breaker for people with ADHD. you paste in a task. it breaks it into 5-10 tiny steps. no login. no ads. no bs. just smaller tasks you can actually start.

tracked my output for 60 days. the days i hit 3 tasks beat the days i had 15 on the list. every time. built a tool around this. coreday.surge.sh
most productivity apps make you track habits. this one doesn't. pick 3 non-negotiables for today. hit them. done. nothing else to fill out. coreday.surge.sh
